name: Sex in a Pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix well melted margarine, chopped pecans, and graham wafer crumbs in a 9x13 inch (22x33 cm) pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F (180 degrees C) until lightly browned, about 20 minutes.
3. Cool completely.
4. Beat together cream cheese, icing sugar, and 1 cup of Cool whip in a separate bowl.
5. Spoon the mixture onto the baked layer.
6. Mix chocolate instant pudding and vanilla instant pudding with milk according to package directions.
7. Let the puddings almost thicken and pour over the second layer.
8. Spread the remaining Cool whip on top and swirl in melted chocolate throughout the topping.
9. This recipe freezes well if kept tightly covered. Just cut off what you would like and keep the rest frozen.
